channel.title: 法句 on 往見
channel.description: Recent content in 法句 on 往見

item.title: 雙品
item.description: Yamaka The Pairs 1 Manopubbaṅgamā dhammā, manoseṭṭhā manomayā, manasā ce paduṭṭhena, bhāsati v

item.title: 不放逸品
item.description: Appamāda Carefulness 21 Appamādo amatapadaṃ, pamādo maccuno padaṃ, appamattā na mīyanti, ye pamattā ya

item.title: 心品
item.description: Citta Thought 33 Phandanaṃ capalaṃ cittaṃ, dūrakkhaṃ dunnivārayaṃ, ujuṃ karoti medhāvī, usukāro va t

item.title: 華品
item.description: Puppha Flowers 44 Ko imaṃ pathaviṃ vicessati, yamalokañca imaṃ sadevakaṃ? ko dhammapadaṃ sudesitaṃ, kusalo puppham-iva pacessati? 誰征服

item.title: 愚品
item.description: Bāla The Fool 60 Dīghā jāgarato ratti, dīghaṃ santassa yojanaṃ, dīgho bālānaṃ saṃsāro, saddhammaṃ avij

item.title: 智者品
item.description: Paṇḍita The Learned Man 76 Nidhīnaṃ va pavattāraṃ, yaṃ passe vajjadassinaṃ, niggayhavādiṃ medhāviṃ

item.title: 阿羅漢品
item.description: Arahanta The Arahant 90 Gataddhino visokassa, vippamuttassa sabbadhi, sabbaganthappahīnassa, pariḷāho na vijjati. 路行盡無憂，於一切解脫，斷一切繫縛，無有苦惱者。 For one who has completed his

item.title: 千品
item.description: Sahassa Thousands 100 Sahassam-api ce vācā, anatthapadasaṃhitā, ekaṃ atthapadaṃ seyyo, yaṃ sutvā upasammati. 雖誦一千言，若無義理者，不如一義語

item.title: 惡品
item.description: Pāpa Evil 116 Abhittharetha kalyāṇe, pāpā cittaṃ nivāraye, dandhañhi karoto puññaṃ, pāpasmiṃ ramatī mano. 應急速作

item.title: 刀杖品
item.description: Daṇḍa Violence 129 Sabbe tasanti daṇḍassa, sabbe bhāyanti maccuno, attānaṃ upamaṃ katvā, na haneyya na ghātaye. 一切懼刀杖，一切皆畏死，

item.title: 老品
item.description: Jarā Old Age 146 Ko nu hāso kim-ānando, niccaṃ pajjalite sati? andhakārena onaddhā, padīpaṃ na gavesatha ? 常在燃燒中，何喜何

item.title: 自己品
item.description: Atta The Self 157 Attānañce piyaṃ jaññā, rakkheyya naṃ surakkhitaṃ, tiṇṇaṃ aññataraṃ yāmaṃ, paṭijagge

item.title: 世品
item.description: Loka The World 167 Hīnaṃ dhammaṃ na seveyya, pamādena na saṃvase, micchādiṭṭhiṃ na seveyya, na siyā lokavaḍḍhano. 莫從

item.title: 佛陀品
item.description: Buddha Awakened 179 Yassa jitaṃ nāvajīyati, jitaṃ yassa no yāti koci loke, taṃ buddham-anantagocaraṃ, apadaṃ kena padena nessatha? 彼之勝

item.title: 樂品
item.description: Sukha Happiness 197 Susukhaṃ vata jīvāma, verinesu averino, verinesu manussesu, viharāma averino. 我等實樂生，憎怨中無憎，於憎怨人中，我等無憎住。 We live very happily indeed without hate among those who hate, among men who

item.title: 喜愛品
item.description: Piya Pleasant 209 Ayoge yuñjam-attānaṃ, yogasmiñca ayojayaṃ, atthaṃ hitvā piyaggāhī, pihetattānu

item.title: 忿怒品
item.description: Kodha Anger 221 Kodhaṃ jahe vippajaheyya mānaṃ, saṃyojanaṃ sabbam-atikkameyya, taṃ nāmarūpasmim-asajjamānaṃ, akiñcanaṃ nānup

item.title: 垢穢品
item.description: Mala Impurity 235 Paṇḍupalāso va dānisi, yamapurisā pi ca te upaṭṭhitā, uyyogamukhe ca tiṭṭhasi, pātheyyam pi ca te na vijjati.

item.title: 法住品
item.description: Dhammaṭṭha The Righteous 256 Na tena hoti dhammaṭṭho, yenatthaṃ sāhasā naye, yo ca atthaṃ anatthañca, ubho niccheyya paṇḍit

item.title: 道品
item.description: Magga The Path 273 Maggānaṭṭhaṅgiko seṭṭho, saccānaṃ caturo padā, virāgo seṭṭho dhammānaṃ, dvipadā

item.title: 雜品
item.description: Pakiṇṇaka Miscellaneous 290 Mattāsukhapariccāgā, passe ce vipulaṃ sukhaṃ, caje mattāsukhaṃ dhīro, sampa

item.title: 地獄品
item.description: Niraya Hell 306 Abhūtavādī nirayaṃ upeti, yo vā pi katvā na karomi cāha, ubho pi te pecca samā bhavanti, nihīnakammā manujā parattha. 說妄語者墮地

item.title: 象品
item.description: Nāga The Elephant 320 Ahaṃ nāgo va saṅgāme, cāpato patitaṃ saraṃ, ativākyaṃ titikkhissaṃ, dussī

item.title: 愛欲品
item.description: Taṇhā Craving 334 Manujassa pamattacārino, taṇhā vaḍḍhati māluvā viya, so plavatī hurā huraṃ, phalam-icc

item.title: 比丘品
item.description: Bhikkhu The Bhikkhu 360 Cakkhunā saṃvaro sādhu, sādhu sotena saṃvaro, ghānena saṃvaro sādhu, sādhu jivhāy

item.title: 婆羅門品
item.description: Brāhmaṇa The Brahman 383 Chinda sotaṃ parakkamma, kāme panuda brāhmaṇa, saṅkhārānaṃ khayaṃ ñatvā, akataññūsi brāhm

item.title: 南傳法句經譯後記
item.description: 「法句」（Dharmapada）是集錄關於佛教道德的格言，屬於巴利（Pāli）三藏的經藏，是小部（Khuddaka-Nikāya）十五卷中的
